_doc: Root-cause manifest for the 100%-green test campaign. Regenerate the diff against a new run's failures file, then update statuses here. Statuses: open-bug (product defect), open-harness (test needs rewrite), infra-flake (load/timing collateral), needs-team-call (product decision required), roadmap-todo (feature unbuilt, tests todo'd), untriaged.

infra_sprint_learnings: 429 retry wrapper active (TW_WORKER_MODE-gated) — kept as safety net, but target clusters did not move; do not credit it tests
3 poll conversions reverted after repeat failures (invoice-created-multi-interval, create-entity-paid, update-prepaid-overage); other 26 files held
TEST_FILE_CONCURRENCY must never be set suite-wide (mrox2ax0: +23 files); pad specific tests only
duration tail: 6m+ bucket eliminated by wave C; 4-6m band (~10 files) persists — usage meter poll likely falling back to fixed loop
open_collateral: mrp2ud8n: scheduled-switch-consumable EXONERATED — reproduced green 3 ways at the red-tip commit; run-level webhook-saturation victim (rotating-victim class). Proposed per-test fix: pollUntil on its advanceToNextInvoice sites — HELD until the E5-surface verdict lands.

mrp2ud8n VERDICT: update-plan-migration-drafts = genuine behavior change from 27a29cd63 (bisect-confirmed): update_variant_ids alone yields no variantUpdate so the disable_version pin misses, ladder falls to hasPlanCustomers, and getVersioningUsage counts the variant's CUSTOM cusProduct as versionable -> variant versions v1->v2 and versionedPlanFilter splits the draft filter. Candidate fix (is_custom exclusion in getVersioningUsage) parked in TEAM_CHOICES #5 — same helper feeds base-plan versioning, needs the team call.

mrp2ud8n VERDICT: update-plan-op-paid-features (2) = pre-existing flake, NOT a regression — signature appears in mrnswqxc pre-D3; code path (runOnServer:false migrateCustomer) never touches the 27a29cd63 surface. Root cause: D3 poll watched the cache-side customers.get while migrateCustomer reads Postgres. FIXED: polls re-pointed at skip_cache read, timeout 6s->15s.

mrp6o292 (68d141a, first run WITH ingress forward-retry): 170 files (+15 vs mrp2ud8n), 20 new / 5 fixed — churn slightly above the ±16 floor, new reds heterogeneous (no shared signature, none on the changed surfaces); watch next run. update-plan-op-paid-features VERIFIED GREEN (skip_cache poll fix). update-plan-migration-drafts still red as expected (parked, TEAM_CHOICES #5).

INGRESS DROP THEORY FALSIFIED (mrp6o292): 716 terminal drops = 716x3 retries with ZERO recoveries, ALL targeting just 3 of 401 workers (socket closed on every attempt) — dead tunnels from crashed workers (8 CRASH files cluster there: updateContUse1-4, newVersion1-2, past-due-void-edge, live-worker-process; all already red pre-crash). Drops are crash FALLOUT confined to the crashed workers' own accounts, NOT fleet saturation — compute bump won't move drops; investigate what crashes those workers instead.

scheduled-switch-consumable RE-ATTRIBUTED (mrp6o292): all 5 tests red again but its account had ZERO drops this run — webhooks delivered but processed slower than advanceToNextInvoice's fixed 15s waits. Per-test fix applied: pollUntilSwitched (poll customers.get until target active + old absent, 60s deadline) before assertions in all 5 tests.
